reason: Amadeus – grand, reflective tale of genius and envy
Contact – contemplative sci-fi on our place in the cosmos
Kundun – lyrical reflection on exile and faith
Titanic – epic romance and tragedy that lingers in memory
Chinatown – moody, thoughtful noir of corruption and fate
Brazil – satirical dreamscape of bureaucratic despair
Gandhi – meditative biopic on peace and sacrifice
Vertigo – psychological spiral of obsession and longing
Rebecca – haunting study of memory and hidden truths
Patton – introspective portrait of authority and isolation
